name: Alert Fiscal Deadlines
description: Send WhatsApp alerts 5 days before fiscal obligation deadlines

parameters.queries: SELECT o.id, o.tenant_id, o.nombre, o.vencimiento, o.monto, t.whatsapp_number FROM obligaciones o JOIN tenants t ON o.tenant_id = t.id WHERE o.vencimiento - CURRENT_DATE = 5 AND o.completada = false

parameters.name: text

parameters.queries: INSERT INTO alerts_sent (tenant_id, obligacion, deadline, sent_at, status) VALUES ('{{ $node['Query Obligaciones (5d)'].json.tenant_id }}', '{{ $node['Query Obligaciones (5d)'].json.nombre }}', '{{ $node['Query Obligaciones (5d)'].json.vencimiento }}', NOW(), 'sent') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

parameters.body: { "text": "⚠️ N8N Alert Sent Failed", "blocks": [{ "type": "section", "text": { "type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Error*: {{ $node['Send WhatsApp Alert'].json.message }}" } }] }
